div.h3: Implementation Spec: Death Detection & Group Rebalance Logic

div.p: Invariants: • LastHeartbeat < session_timeout • IsAlive == true • Partition assignment active
Invariants: • LastHeartbeat > timeout / 2 • IsAlive == true • WarningStatus = PENDING_TIMEOUT
Invariants: • LastHeartbeat > session_timeout • IsAlive == false • Consumer generation invalidated

ul.li: DEAD → ALIVE: Prohibited. (Must instantiate new ConsumerID).
DEAD → SUSPECTED: Terminal state logic failure.
Skip Heartbeat: Check interval must be timeout / 3.
🟡 SUSPECTED: Network jitter or GC pause.
🔴 DEAD: Eviction from group, rebalance start.

div.p: text T=0s T=15s T=30s T=31s │ │ │ │ [H] Received [H] Missing [H] Expired [D] Detected │ │ │ │ └────────────┴─────────────┴─────────────┘ Window-1 Window-2 Deadline
